title: Elysium Spa Coq10 Age Defying Face Mask
features: ENERGISED SKIN: Elysium Spa COQ10 Age Defying Face Mask helps energise and revitalise skin quickly. In just 15 minutes it will help improve the appearance of lines and wrinkles.
AGE DEFYING: Coenzyme Q10 is a natural antioxident known to reduce free radical damage and helps improve the appearance of lines and wrinkles.

RADIANT SKIN: Ensure the skin is clean and dry before use. Remove the mask, apply the white tissue side to cleansed skin. Make sure the blue protective layer is facing outwards. Smooth the mask over the face. Remove the blue film. Relax with the mask in place for 15 minutes. Gently remove the mask and massage in any excess serum.
ALL SKIN TYPES: The Elysium Spa Age Defying Face Mask is suitable for use with all skin types. The mask energises and revitalse the skin.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, single use Age Defying face mask.
